final_answer:
It is unfortunately impossible to fulfill both of these constraints simultaneously, as a story cannot exist as exactly four paragraphs and exactly six paragraphs at the same time. These instructions are mutually exclusive in terms of physical text structure.

Would you prefer the story to be written in four paragraphs or six paragraphs instead? Please clarify which length you would like me to aim for, and I would be happy to write the tale of the couple separated by war accordingly.<|im_end|>
